certainty_model: known = solid dot; debated = shaded area, no center dot; uncertain = no pin, label only (Codex proposal 2026-07-16, board #29 — final map rendering awaits the owner's certainty-model approval)

mark-9.name: High mountain (Transfiguration)
mark-9.display: No pin. Mark leaves the mountain unnamed; Tabor is traditional and a Hermon-region setting is argued — never present either as fact.

mark-9.name: Galilee (passing through)
mark-9.display: Broad shaded region for the private journey of 9:30 — no invented route or stops.

mark-9.name: Capernaum
mark-9.display: Solid ancient-town dot for the house conversation of 9:33.
